blocks.text: The [[Kingdom of Mali]] was one of the great empires of West Africa.

blocks.alt: Map of the Kingdom of Mali
blocks.caption: The Kingdom of Mali grew into a powerful trading empire in West Africa.

blocks.text: Mali became known for its wealth, especially through the trade of [[gold]] and [[salt]].

kingdom of mali.definition: A powerful West African empire known for trade, wealth, and learning.

gold.definition: A valuable yellow metal used in trade and wealth.

salt.definition: A mineral used in food and trade.

worksheet.title: Understanding the Kingdom of Mali
worksheet.prompt:
1. Where was the Kingdom of Mali located?

2. Why did Mali become wealthy?

3. What do the picture and map help you understand?
